case_title: DANIELS DISPLAY CO. INC. VS TOUCH OF GOLD INC.

docket_entries.description: ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: OCT-08-1992 AS TO THIRD PARTY SMITH KRISTIN
